summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The NYLI International Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NISM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of foreign small- and mid-cap stocks selected based on macroeconomic analysis and fundamental research of individual companies. The ETF seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation NISM was launched on May 13, 2026 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: New York Life Investment Management Announces Launch of International Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NISM)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New York Life Investment Management today announced the launch of the NYLI International Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NYSE:NISM), designed to provide investors with access to h...

news.t: New York Life Investment Management Announces Launch of International Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NISM)

holdings.infoBox: NISM is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nissan Chemical stock at 2.54%, HORIBA at 2.40%, Terna at 2.29%, WHSP Holdings at 2.23%, and Empire Company at 2.20%.
